title: cosmidium gracile
intro: Cosmidium gracile, also known as the slender lady's mantle or slender alum root, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the saxifragaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and urinary tract problems, due to its diuretic and astringent properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which provide various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as aiding in wound healing and reducing fever. The herbal preparations of Cosmidium gracile typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken internally, or used topically for skin issues.
